case_title: ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. THOMAS WELLS et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-08-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-17-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-08-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-17-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS, THOMAS A MINOR WELLS, CARL GARDNER, TRAVIS A MINOR DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-08-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-03-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-24-2003
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUL-08-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

SANCTIONS OF $250.00 AGAINST CHARLES C. SLATER, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUL-08-2003 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-24-2003. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY IRENE BURNS. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
